# omada_firewall_acls (Data Source)

Lists all firewall ACL rules of a given type on the Omada Controller for the given site.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String) The ID of the site to query.
- `type` (Number) The ACL type to list: 0=gateway, 1=switch, 2=eap.

### Read-Only

- `acl_rules` (Attributes List) List of ACL rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--acl_rules))

<a id="nestedatt--acl_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `acl_rules`

Read-Only:

- `bi_directional` (Boolean) Applies in both directions.
- `destination_ids` (List of String) Destination entity IDs.
- `destination_type` (Number) Destination type: 0=network, 2=ip_group.
- `id` (String) The ACL rule ID.
- `index` (Number) Rule ordering index.
- `lan_to_lan` (Boolean) Applies to LAN-to-LAN traffic.
- `lan_to_wan` (Boolean) Applies to LAN-to-WAN traffic.
- `name` (String) The rule name.
- `policy` (Number) The policy: 0=deny, 1=permit.
- `protocols` (List of Number) IP protocol numbers.
- `source_ids` (List of String) Source entity IDs.
- `source_type` (Number) Source type: 0=network, 2=ip_group.
- `status` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `type` (Number) The ACL type: 0=gateway, 1=switch, 2=eap.
